items.title: Lucid denies rumors of bankruptcy after over 40% stock drop
items.body: Electric vehicle maker Lucid Group has denied rumors of an imminent bankruptcy after a report from this morning sent the stock on a dramatic drop on Wall Street, seeing losses of more than 40 percent during trading hours…
